zh.lifeSummary: 當Géraud Ier de Mâcon於1124年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易姆a孔時，他的父親Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté29歲，母親Poncette de Traves29歲。他於1152年與Maurette de Salins在法國瑟-吉馬內薩林斯結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1184年9月15日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯o享年60歲，埋葬在法國福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Géraud Ier de Mâcon于1124年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易姆a孔时，他的父亲Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté29岁，母亲Poncette de Traves29岁。他于1152年与Maurette de Salins在法国瑟-吉馬內薩林斯结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1184年9月15日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯o享年60岁，埋葬在法国福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mâcon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places so called, e.g. in Saône-et-Loire.
French: from the old oblique form of the ancient Germanic personal name Mako, a variant of Mago, a short form of compound names formed with maht ‘strength, power’ as the first element.
French (Maçon): occupational name for a mason, (Old) French maçon.

variants.name: Mason
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English masoun ‘mason, stone worker, builder in stone’ (Old Central French maçon, masson). A Middle English form machun (derived from Old French machun) gives rise to Machin and its variants. See also Mayson . Stonemasonry was a hugely important craft in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Géraud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Géraud Ier de Mâcon was born in 1124, in Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté, was 29 and his mother, Poncette de Traves, was 29. He married Maurette de Salins in 1152, in Salins, Seine-et-Marne, France. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 15 September 1184, in Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 60, and was buried in Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Géraud Ier de Mâcon est né en 1124, à Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Poncette de Traves, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Maurette de Salins en 1152, à Salins, Seine-et-Marne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 15 septembre 1184, à Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Géraud Ier de Mâcon 1124 in Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté 29 und seine Mutter Poncette de Traves 29. Er hat 1152 in Salins, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich Maurette de Salins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 15. September 1184 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Géraud Ier de Mâcon è nato il nel 1124 nel Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Poncette de Traves, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Maurette de Salins nel 1152, nel Salins, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 15 settembre 1184, nel Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Géraud Ier de Mâconが1124年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアームaコンで生まれた時，父Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comtéは29歳，母Poncette de Travesは29歳であった。1152年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンサリンスでMaurette de Salinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1184年9月15日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスルhoンで60歳で死去し，フランスフランチェ-コムトeドウブズベサンcオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Géraud Ier de Mâcon(이)가 1124년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 a콘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Poncette de Traves(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1152년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 살린스에서 Maurette de Salins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1184년 9월 15일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 ho니에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 다브스 베산c에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Géraud Ier de Mâcon nasceu em 1124, em Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Poncette de Traves, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Maurette de Salins em 1152, em Salins, Seine-et-Marne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1184, em Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Géraud Ier de Mâcon родился в 1124 г. в местности мaкон, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Poncette de Traves, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Maurette de Salins в 1152 г. в местности салинс, сине-ет-марн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 15 сентября 1184 г. в местности рoн, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности бесанcон, доубс, фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Géraud Ier de Mâcon nació en 1124, en Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Poncette de Traves, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Maurette de Salins en 1152, en Salins, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1184, en Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia.
